## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate:content`
- [ ] `npm run validate:a11y`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Notes

- [ ] I did not include recalled live exam questions or proprietary assessment content.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I avoided committing learner data, credentials, or generated build artifacts.
